title: Detecting Test Case Smells using Prompt Enginnering: Empirical Study in Industry
author: Chaves, Lennon
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Detecting Test Case Smells using Prompt Enginnering: Empirical Study in Industry  
 
 Do you agree with the LLM's response?  
 Give a Score (0 to 5) for the LLM's response

 Ambiguity 
 Conditional Logic

 Unexplained terms and abbreviations 
 Pre-conditions written as steps of action 
 Action steps without corresponding verifications 
 Grammar and spelling errors 
 Expected results that do not match the associated action step 
 Test case title matches the test case steps 
 Test case objective matches the test case steps 
 
 
 Total number of issues 
 Number of changes to be made in the test case 
 Provide feedback on the LLM for this activity. Please mention both advantages and disadvantages.
